info.name: Fileam Backend API (Updated)
info.description: Fileam Backend API v1. Base: {{baseUrl}}/api/v{{apiVersion}}. Auth: Bearer {{accessToken}}. Upload files via Media first, then use returned URL in other endpoints. Enterprise Signup: Step Email → Step Email verify (saves enterpriseOnboardingToken) → Step Password (requires Authorization: Bearer {{enterpriseOnboardingToken}}). Expense categories: Rent, Tools & Software, Marketing, Internet, Salary, Other. Sale categories: Consulting, Product Sales, Service Income, Subscription, Other. Employment types: Part time, Full time, Contract.
